caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Bimini Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing moderate northerly winds at 19 knots with seas around 2.9 feet and an 8-second swell period. Rain probability is 67%, indicating a significant chance of showers, while Grand Cayman sees lighter winds near 13 knots and less impactful conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Affect Marseille Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing sustained winds up to 27 kt with wave heights reaching 3.8 ft and a dominant southwest swell direction at a 5-second period. There is a 24% rain probability, indicating scattered showers, while Dubrovnik sees lighter winds near 15 kt and less impact from precipitation.
